error_signature: Trello node not fetching boards, stuck on loading
title: Trello node stuck on loading when fetching boards
symptom: The Trello node is stuck on loading and does not display any boards. Attempts to create a card also result in loading without success.
applies_when: Using Trello node to fetch boards
not_this_if: Fetching boards works in other workflows
root_cause: The Trello node may not be properly configured to retrieve the list ID for the cards, leading to a failure in fetching the necessary data. This can occur if the node does not handle the API response correctly or if there are issues with the Trello API itself.
fix_steps: Use an HTTP request node to manually fetch the cards information for the board.
Replace the board ID in the request URL with your specific board ID.
Test the HTTP request to ensure it retrieves the correct data.
agent_instruction: Use an HTTP request node to fetch card information from Trello instead of relying on the Trello node.
